tasks.label: Finalize sync and push
tasks.command: git add docs/categories/ustawienia.js docs/assets/app.js .vscode/tasks.json; git commit -m "chore: compact zaproszenia settings rows"; git pull --rebase origin main; git push origin main; git restore .vscode/tasks.json; git --no-pager status --short

tasks.label: git-push-main
tasks.command: Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .git\rebase-merge -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; git push origin main

tasks.label: git-fetch
tasks.command: git fetch origin main; git log --oneline origin/main -3

tasks.label: git-rebase-and-push
tasks.command: git rebase origin/main; git push origin main

tasks.label: git-cleanup
tasks.command: Remove-Item -Force cleanup-rebase.ps1, finalize-push.ps1, finalize.bat, finalize.py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; git status --short

tasks.label: git-commit-push
tasks.command: git add docs/categories/wlepki-naklejki.html docs/categories/banner.html src/ui/views/wlepki-naklejki.ts docs/assets/app.js; git commit -m "fix: unify breakdown styles in wlepki/banner; hide zero modifier in wlepki szt summary"; git push origin main

tasks.label: git-commit-push2
tasks.command: git add docs/categories/wlepki-naklejki.html docs/categories/banner.html src/ui/views/wlepki-naklejki.ts docs/assets/app.js; git commit -m 'fix: unify breakdown styles wlepki/banner, hide zero modifier in szt summary'; git push origin main

tasks.label: git-status-check
tasks.command: git status --short; git log --oneline -3; git log --oneline origin/main -3

tasks.label: git-diff-check
tasks.command: git diff HEAD -- docs/categories/wlepki-naklejki.html src/ui/views/wlepki-naklejki.ts docs/assets/app.js
